title: helicotropis linearis
intro: Helicotropis linearis, also known as the False Hops or American Hops, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and insomnia, and has been used to treat various conditions, including menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Helicotropis linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it an accessible and versatile remedy for various health needs.
